notes: I got it working! You have to download this fix https://megagames.com/download/324620/0, extract it an copy the TheBureau.exe file from the files folder of the extracted folder to ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/The Bureau/Binaries/Win32/. (I also ran the command WINEPREFIX=/media/richard/HDD2TB/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/65930/pfx/ winetricks dotnet35 dotnet40 vcrun2008, but I don't think it is necessary.)
title: The Bureau: XCOM Declassified

notes: I got it working! You have to download this fix https://megagames.com/download/324620/0, extract it an copy the TheBureau.exe file from the files folder of the extracted folder to ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/The Bureau/Binaries/Win32/. (I also ran the commands WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/65930/pfx/ winetricks dotnet35 dotnet40 vcrun2008 and WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/65930/pfx/ winecfg and changed the Windows version to Windows 7, but I don't think it is necessary.)
title: The Bureau: XCOM Declassified

notes:
as noted before the game needs a specific fix (The Bureau: XCOM Declassified - v20150114 PROPHET )  the game has some DRM problem it seems that only works with the mentioned fix.

You also need to install dotnet35 and then dotnet40 on top otherwise I won't work, if you use protontricks with proton 4.2-9 dotnet35 fails to install so you need to use another wine version specifying WINEPREFIX  with the  winetricks command, I used wine version 4.12, some wine version will fail to install dotnet35 so be aware of that, if it fails you have to delete the pfx folder and start all over, and try with a different wine version. Also you need to delete the files from CommonRedist folder and while the gaming is running the first time you need to kill the DotNet Full installer and the DXSETUP installer (so at the first time launch, steam just skips those installers), just deleting those installers would be more optimal but I don't know where those installer are located.
title: The Bureau: XCOM Declassified

notes: Followed directions of other Gold report, I downloaded this fix https://megagames.com/download/324620/0, extracted it and copied the TheBureau.exe file from the files folder of the extracted folder to ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/The Bureau/Binaries/Win32/.  Did not do anything else.  Game ran with no further problems.  Had 2 launch options, successfully used DX11 option.
title: The Bureau: XCOM Declassified

notes:
While working with the beforementioned "fix", the file is malicious (as confirmed by multiple positives on virustotal.com). While the effect of the detected trojan to the system is reduced due to it running in a proton/wine environment, it may still operate as intended by the creator, which may be harmful to you or your system.

I do NOT recommend to use this approach to get the game working.

Find the virustotal report here (or upload the file yourself):
